name: Trekking Caving Ba Be National Park 3 Days 2 Nights
highlights: Paddle through the crystal-clear waters to visit the awe-inspiring Puong Cave, known for its impressive stalactites and dramatic rock formations
Venture into the hidden gem of Tham Phay Cave and be mesmerized by the ancient stalactites and stalagmites that have formed over millennia
Embark on an exhilarating hike through the dense jungles of Ba Be National Park, where you’ll encounter a rich tapestry of wildlife and vibrant flora
Immerse yourself in Tay culture with an authentic homestay experience, connect with local families, and learn about their customs and traditions
Visit the sacred An Ma Temple, a tranquil cultural landmark nestled in the heart of nature

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Ba Be Lake Adventure
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 07:30, our guide pick you up from your hotel in Hanoi, where you will be welcomed for an exciting adventure to Ba Be National Park. The scenic 5-hour drive takes you through the picturesque countryside of Northern Vietnam, with lush rice fields, traditional villages, and limestone mountains dotting the landscape. Along the way, enjoy a lunch break to energize you for the day ahead. Afternoon

Upon arrival at Boc Lom Pier, you'll learn how to paddle a kayak and take essential equipment. Then travel down to the tranquil Nang River, exploring the stunning Puong Cave with its impressiv...

itinerary.title: Tham Phay Cave Expedition
itinerary.description:
Morning

From 07:00 - 07:30, start your adventure with a convenient pick-up at your homestay, followed by a quick briefing to prepare for the exciting day ahead. A 30-minute drive through the scenic landscapes of Ba Be National Park will take you to the starting point of your trek to Tham Phay Cave, one of the park's hidden gems. Your hike begins with a steep uphill trail winding through lush forests, where you'll encounter unique flora and the sounds of local wildlife. The terrain gradually becomes more rugged with rocky paths, you will be guided by an experienced local who will ensure your s...

itinerary.title: Jungle Trekking (5 - 7 km) & Return to Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Distance & Est. time: Trekking 5-7 km

Around 07:30, you begin your day with a hearty breakfast at your homestay, preparing for the final adventure in Ba Be National Park. From Bo Lu Village, your guide will lead you on a scenic trek through the park's lush jungle. As you wander through this vibrant ecosystem, marvel at the diverse flora and fauna, from towering ancient trees to colorful bird species filling the air with their calls. Reaching Tham Khit pathways to an ancient cave, adventurers can have a stroll around the lake to the panoramic views of the ranger station's animal observation hu...

included: AC vehicle, Round-trip transportation from selected hotels
Accommodation at Tay’s houses in Ba Be National Park
Meals as stated in the itinerary
All sightseeing tickets and travel permits
Kayak & boat tour on Ba Be lake
Safety and caving equipment: caving helmets, caving headlights, basic canvas hiking boots, gloves
First Aid Kit and Medical Rescue Equipment
